events.label: assistant
events.text:
Wrote the assessment to `/app/answer.json`.

**Key finding:** The illegible duration for Activity M doesn't actually block the calculation. M sits in a strictly serial run of the schedule (L → M → N → {O,P} → Q) with no parallel path bypassing it, so it has zero float and is necessarily on the critical path regardless of its exact original duration. Since the disruption is stated as an additive "+2 workdays" rather than a new absolute duration, it pushes the entire downstream chain (N, O, P, final inspection Q) by 2 workdays — a **2-workday project delay**.
